MINI MINUTES: Line 3
Judge Pro Tem: Adrian Colley, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501/JPT)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Parkmerced Owner is present. Represented by Donna Stern.
Attorney David Wasserman for the plaintiff.
Defendant John Livingston is present.
Attorney Robert Beyers appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem , litigants and counsel confer for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. The trial date of Feb. 29, 2016 is vacated. (501/jpt)
